name: Class Effectiveness & Teacher Quality
description: Class-level learning outcomes with teacher-restricted data access

cards.title: Class Performance vs Peer Average
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                course_id as "Course ID",
                                school_id as "School",
                                grade_level as "Grade",
                                ROUND(avg_grade_numeric, 2) as "Avg Grade",
                                ROUND(course_avg_grade, 2) as "Course Average",
                                ROUND(grade_diff_from_course_avg, 2) as "Difference",
                                enrollment_count as "Student Count"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_class_section_comparison
                            ORDER BY grade_diff_from_course_avg DESC

cards.title: My Classes (Top 10)
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                course_id as class_id,
                                ROUND(AVG(grade_diff_from_course_avg), 1) as learning_gain
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_class_section_comparison
                            GROUP BY course_id
                            ORDER BY learning_gain DESC
                            LIMIT 10

cards.title: Student Growth Trajectory
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                ROUND(avg_grade_numeric / 0.5) * 0.5 as gain_range,
                                COUNT(*) as class_count
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_class_section_comparison
                            GROUP BY ROUND(avg_grade_numeric / 0.5) * 0.5
                            ORDER BY gain_range
